---
title: "Synthesis & Reporting"
description: "Evidence integration across all phases, publication-quality figures,
  honest limitations documentation, and portfolio finalization."
date: 2026-08-01
image: "/images/Phase 6.png" 
---

## Overview

Ties all previous phases into a coherent narrative. Core question: does CYP2C19
metabolizer status correlate with detectable transcriptomic signatures in
postmortem psychiatric brain, and is there convergent evidence from chromatin
accessibility?

**Timeline:** Weeks 14–17

## Evidence Integration

*Coming soon.*

## Limitations

*Coming soon.*

## Deliverables

*Coming soon.*

## Results

*Coming soon.*
